'''Seltos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its [[Sommin City]] was home to the largest [[Tarro]] remnant. Its primary industries included agriculture, [[Wood/Legends|lumber]] production, and [[Mining/Legends|mining]] of valuable [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. Visitors to Seltos' nature preserves provided a small boost to the economy as well. Natives of Seltos were considered congenial and pleasant.

==History==
Seltos was originally colonized with logging as the basis of its economy. It eventually became part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which maintained only a small outpost consisting of an Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] and two [[Company/Legends|companies]] of [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] on the planet. An uprising against the Imperial governor of Seltos resulted in the formation of a pro-[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] government. However, Seltos' [[Magister of Trade]], [[Sinya Deboora]], was revealed as an Imperial spy by a group of New Republic operatives who thwarted an Imperial plot to retake the planet.<ref name="FSS" />
